info.title: Team Task Manager API
info.description:
A RESTful API for managing team tasks and collaboration.

Features
- User authentication: register, login, logout, OAuth, email verification, and password reset
- Team management and role-based member administration
- Task management with filters, dashboards, and reminders
- Invitation workflows for teams and members
- Notification feeds and preference controls
- Downloadable OpenAPI JSON plus a generated Postman collection

Authentication
This API uses session-based authentication with HTTP-only cookies.
After logging in, the session cookie is automatically sent with each request.

password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number

avatar.description: Image file to upload. Takes precedence over avatar_url.

avatar_url.description: Profile avatar URL when not uploading a file.

role.description: Current user's role in this team

message.example: You have been assigned a new task

avatar_url.description: Optional avatar URL if you are not uploading a file.

example.message: Please log in to access this resource
You do not have permission to perform this action

get.summary: Verify email with token (from email link)

400.description: Email already verified or rate limited

200.description: Reset email sent (always returns success for security)
Verification email sent to new address

400.description: Password incorrect or email same as current

get.summary: Accept invitation from email link (public - no auth required)
Decline invitation from email link (public - no auth required)
Get all invitations for a team

409.description: User already member or invitation pending

delete.summary: Remove member from team (Admin/Owner or self)

get.summary: Get all notifications for current user

get.description: Returns task counts by status and lists of due soon and overdue tasks
Returns tasks due within the specified number of days

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days ahead to look for due tasks

get.description: Returns all tasks that are past their due date and not completed

get.summary: Get all tasks for current user
get.description: Returns tasks assigned to or created by the current user with optional filters

parameters.name: assigned_to_me
parameters.description: Show only tasks assigned to current user

403.description: Not a member of the specified team

get.summary: Get all teams for current user

200.description: List of user's teams with member/task counts

get.summary: Get all tasks for a team
